mapper.insert: insert into tbl_advertisement (advertiser_id, title, headline, description, landing_url, budget, impression_estimate, started_at) values (#{advertiserId}, #{title}, #{headline}, #{description}, #{landingUrl}, #{budget}, #{impressionEstimate}, #{startedAt}::timestamp)
mapper.select: select id, advertiser_id, title, headline, description, landing_url, budget, impression_estimate, receipt_id, status, started_at, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_advertisement

select distinct id, advertiser_id, title, headline, description, landing_url, budget, impression_estimate, receipt_id, status, started_at, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_advertisement
order by created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select id, advertiser_id, title, headline, description, landing_url, budget, impression_estimate, receipt_id, status, started_at, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_advertisement where id = #{id}
